title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO GARAMPANG, ROSARIO, LA UNION, TO BARRIO SAN JOSE, ROSARIO, LA UNION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3757 / 53 OG No. 15, 4777 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1651, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO GARAMPANG, ROSARIO, LA UNION, TO BARRIO SAN JOSE, ROSARIO, LA UNION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of Garampang in the Municipality of Rosario, La Union, shall be renamed barrio San Jose, Rosario, La Union.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
